en.title: Autonomous Driving · An EM Twin for V2X and Vehicle-Road-Cloud Communication

fields.Headline: Make Autonomous Driving "Get Communication Right"
fields.Headline-em: An EM Twin for V2X and Vehicle-Road-Cloud
fields.Sub: High-level autonomous driving depends on the coordination of V2X, cellular, satellite, and Wi-Fi multipath links. Yet in complex scenarios such as urban canyons, tunnels, overpasses, and underground garages, the communication link is the most easily overlooked weak point in the ADAS/AD safety closed loop. MetaRadio's three-layer product portfolio delivers V2X channel simulation, HIL testing for T-Box/OBU/RSU, and road-network-scale EM twin capabilities within the vehicle-road-cloud system.

items.title: Headline
items.text: Make Autonomous Driving "Get Communication Right"

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: An EM Twin for V2X and Vehicle-Road-Cloud

items.title: Sub
items.text: High-level autonomous driving depends on the coordination of V2X, cellular, satellite, and Wi-Fi multipath links. Yet in complex scenarios such as urban canyons, tunnels, overpasses, and underground garages, the communication link is the most easily overlooked weak point in the ADAS/AD safety closed loop. MetaRadio's three-layer product portfolio delivers V2X channel simulation, HIL testing for T-Box/OBU/RSU, and road-network-scale EM twin capabilities within the vehicle-road-cloud system.

sections.label: Communication Challenges for Intelligent Connected Vehicles
sections.heading: Challenge · Communication Challenges for Intelligent Connected Vehicles

fields.Title: A Substantial Share of Autonomous Driving's "Long-Tail Scenarios" Hide in Communication
fields.Description: The functional-safety evolution of intelligent driving has already extended from perception and decision-making to communication. A single handover failure or one hidden blind spot can disable remote driving, cooperative lane change, and vehicle-road cooperative perception.

table.Title: Overpasses and Tunnels
table.Text: Multipath and handover issues at overpasses and tunnel entrances cannot be precisely characterized by traditional statistical models.

table.Title: Urban Canyons
table.Text: GNSS and cellular multipath problems arise simultaneously among high-rise blocks, affecting positioning and communication.

table.Title: Garages and Campuses
table.Text: Coverage and handover in indoor parking lots and low-rise campuses are a hidden threshold for high-level AVP automated valet parking.

sections.label: Deploying the Three-Layer Portfolio in Autonomous Driving
sections.heading: Solution · Deploying the Three-Layer Portfolio in Autonomous Driving

fields.Title: Run "That Road" Ten Thousand Times in Simulation First
fields.Description: Lauraycs provides high-fidelity channels that jointly model the road network, vehicles, and RSUs. L2 reproduces real road tests with HIL, and L3 links with vehicle-road cooperative platforms to form a road-network-scale EM twin. The whole stack supports everything from single-vehicle terminal testing to intersection-, segment-, and city-scale road-network validation.

table.Description: Joint modeling of road network/tunnel/overpass/campus 3D + vehicle trajectories + multiple RSUs/base stations, outputting V2X Uu/PC5 channels.
Drives T-Box/OBU/RSU HIL with real road-network channels, regressing handover, remote driving, and positioning KPIs.
Intersection- and segment-scale EM twin, linked with vehicle-road cooperative platforms and ETC/MEC.

table.Title: Road Network and Vehicle Modeling
table.Desc: High-precision map + traffic-flow trajectories + live base station/RSU configuration.

table.Title: V2X Channel Simulation
table.Desc: Joint time-varying multipath and handover across Uu (cellular) + PC5 (sidelink) dual links.

table.Title: Vehicle-Side / Roadside HIL
table.Desc: The channel simulator drives T-Box/OBU/RSU, regressing handover/packet loss/positioning.

table.Title: Road-Network Twin
table.Desc: EM-situation twin of intersections and segments, interfacing with vehicle-road cooperative platforms.

table.Spec: 3GPP C-V2X (Rel-14/15), NR V2X (Rel-16/17/18), IEEE 802.11p/bd, CCSA YD/T
Cellular FR1/FR2, 5.9 GHz sidelink, millimeter wave (long term), satellite-assisted
Urban canyon, overpass, tunnel, bridge, campus, garage, highway, rural expressway
Arbitrary programmable vehicle/UAV/RSU trajectories; supports multi-vehicle cooperation and platooning
T-Box, OBU, RSU, 4D radar, millimeter-wave modules
PER, TPUT, RSRP/SINR, PC5 link stability, remote-driving RTT, AVP handover
Supports interfacing with SiL/HiL autonomous-driving simulation platforms (CARLA/Prescan/VTD)
Lab + intersection/segment pilots; integrated with OEM automated test platforms

fields.Road-network-scale RT: Brings an entire intersection/segment into the simulation at once, avoiding single-base-station approximations.
fields.Uu + PC5 dual link: A single simulation outputs both cellular and sidelink channels simultaneously.
fields.ADAS-simulation ready: "Plugs" the communication side into existing autonomous-driving SiL/HiL workflows.
fields.Rich scenario library: ADAS long-tail scenarios such as overpasses, tunnels, and garages are ready-built and reusable.
fields.Repeatable road tests: Converts a field "near-miss" event into a repeatable script.
fields.Domestically controllable: Forms a fully domestic V2X HIL solution together with domestic instrument and RSU vendors.

items.title: Road-network-scale RT
items.text: Brings an entire intersection/segment into the simulation at once, avoiding single-base-station approximations.

items.title: Uu + PC5 dual link
items.text: A single simulation outputs both cellular and sidelink channels simultaneously.

items.title: ADAS-simulation ready
items.text: "Plugs" the communication side into existing autonomous-driving SiL/HiL workflows.

items.title: Rich scenario library
items.text: ADAS long-tail scenarios such as overpasses, tunnels, and garages are ready-built and reusable.

items.title: Repeatable road tests
items.text: Converts a field "near-miss" event into a repeatable script.

items.title: Domestically controllable
items.text: Forms a fully domestic V2X HIL solution together with domestic instrument and RSU vendors.

table.Title: T-Box / OBU Testing
table.Text: Reproduces real road conditions and runs regression tests on terminal remote driving and cooperative lane change.

table.Title: RSU Intersection Deployment
table.Text: Simulates intersection coverage and handover performance for different RSU positions/antenna schemes.

table.Title: Highway V2X
table.Text: Evaluates link stability for high-speed mobility + handover/platooning in highway scenarios.

table.Title: AVP Automated Valet Parking
table.Text: Joint evaluation of EM coverage and positioning accuracy in garages + campuses.

table.Title: Commercial Fleets
table.Text: Remote-driving/platooning link assurance for logistics + mining + ports.

table.Title: Vehicle-Road-Cloud Cooperation
table.Text: End-to-end KPI simulation across MEC + intersection + vehicle side.

table.Label: Joint virtual road test / V2X HIL cases
Integrated with multiple RSU equipment vendors
Interfaced with automotive-grade automated test platforms

zh-CN.title: 自动驾驶 · V2X 与车路云通信的电磁孪生

fields.Badge: Vertical Datasheet · 自动驾驶 / Autonomous Driving
fields.Eyebrow: 行业垂直市场解决方案
fields.Headline: 让自动驾驶的"通信不出错"
fields.Headline-em: V2X 与车路云的电磁孪生
fields.Sub: 高阶自动驾驶离不开 V2X、蜂窝、卫星、Wi-Fi 多链路协同。但城市峡谷、隧道、立交、地库等复杂场景下，通信链路是 ADAS/AD 安全闭环里最容易被忽视的薄弱环。乾径以三层产品在车路云体系中提供 V2X 信道仿真、T-Box/OBU/RSU 的 HIL 测试，以及路网级电磁孪生能力。

items.title: Badge
items.text: Vertical Datasheet · 自动驾驶 / Autonomous Driving

items.title: Eyebrow
items.text: 行业垂直市场解决方案

items.title: Headline
items.text: 让自动驾驶的"通信不出错"

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: V2X 与车路云的电磁孪生

items.title: Sub
items.text: 高阶自动驾驶离不开 V2X、蜂窝、卫星、Wi-Fi 多链路协同。但城市峡谷、隧道、立交、地库等复杂场景下，通信链路是 ADAS/AD 安全闭环里最容易被忽视的薄弱环。乾径以三层产品在车路云体系中提供 V2X 信道仿真、T-Box/OBU/RSU 的 HIL 测试，以及路网级电磁孪生能力。

sections.label: 智能网联汽车的通信难题
sections.heading: Challenge · 智能网联汽车的通信难题

fields.Title: 自动驾驶的"长尾场景"，相当一部分藏在通信里
fields.Description: 智能驾驶的功能安全演进，已经从感知和决策延伸到通信。一次切换失败、一个隐性盲区，可能就让远程驾驶、协同变道、车路协同感知功能失效。

table.Title: 立交与隧道
table.Text: 立交桥、隧道口的多径与切换问题，传统统计模型无法精确刻画。

table.Title: 城市峡谷
table.Text: 高楼街区下的 GNSS 与蜂窝多径同时出现问题，影响定位与通信。

table.Title: 地库与园区
table.Text: 室内停车场、园区低层的覆盖与切换是高阶 AVP 自动泊车的隐藏门槛。

sections.label: 三层产品在自动驾驶的部署
sections.heading: Solution · 三层产品在自动驾驶的部署

fields.Title: 把"那条路"先在仿真里跑一万遍
fields.Description: Lauraycs 提供路网 + 车辆 + RSU 联合的高保真信道，L2 用 HIL 复现真实路测，L3 与车路协同平台联动形成路网级电磁孪生。整体支持从单车终端测试到路口/路段/城市级路网验证。

table.Description: 路网/隧道/立交/园区 3D + 车辆轨迹 + 多 RSU/基站联合，输出 V2X Uu/PC5 信道。
用真实路网信道驱动 T-Box/OBU/RSU HIL，回归切换、远程驾驶、定位 KPI。
路口/路段级电磁孪生，与车路协同平台、ETC/MEC 联动。

table.Title: 路网与车辆建模
table.Desc: 高精地图 + 车流轨迹 + 现网基站/RSU 配置。

table.Title: V2X 信道仿真
table.Desc: Uu (蜂窝) + PC5 (直连) 双链路联合时变多径与切换。

table.Title: 车端/路端 HIL
table.Desc: 信道仿真仪驱动 T-Box/OBU/RSU，回归切换/丢包/定位。

table.Title: 路网孪生
table.Desc: 路口/路段电磁态势孪生，与车路协同平台对接。

table.规格: 蜂窝 FR1/FR2、5.9 GHz 直连、毫米波远期、卫星辅助
城市峡谷、立交、隧道、桥梁、园区、地库、高速、农村快速路
任意可编程车辆/UAV/RSU 轨迹；支持多车协同与编队
PER、TPUT、RSRP/SINR、PC5 链路稳定性、远程驾驶 RTT、AVP 切换
支持与 SiL/HiL 自动驾驶仿真平台 (CARLA/Prescan/VTD) 对接
实验室 + 路口/路段试点；与车厂自动化测试平台集成

fields.路网级 RT: 把整个路口/路段一次性纳入仿真，避免单基站近似。
fields.Uu + PC5 双链路: 同一仿真同时输出蜂窝与直连两路信道。
fields.可对接 ADAS 仿真: 把通信侧"接入"现有自动驾驶 SiL/HiL 流程。
fields.场景库丰富: 立交、隧道、地库等 ADAS 长尾场景已成型并可复用。
fields.可重复路测: 把外场某次"差点出事"的事件转换为可重复脚本。
fields.国产可控: 配合国产仪器与 RSU 厂商形成全国产 V2X HIL 方案。

items.title: 路网级 RT
items.text: 把整个路口/路段一次性纳入仿真，避免单基站近似。

items.title: Uu + PC5 双链路
items.text: 同一仿真同时输出蜂窝与直连两路信道。

items.title: 可对接 ADAS 仿真
items.text: 把通信侧"接入"现有自动驾驶 SiL/HiL 流程。

items.title: 场景库丰富
items.text: 立交、隧道、地库等 ADAS 长尾场景已成型并可复用。

items.title: 可重复路测
items.text: 把外场某次"差点出事"的事件转换为可重复脚本。

items.title: 国产可控
items.text: 配合国产仪器与 RSU 厂商形成全国产 V2X HIL 方案。

table.Title: T-Box / OBU 测试
table.Text: 复现真实路况，对终端的远程驾驶、协同变道做回归测试。

table.Title: RSU 路口部署
table.Text: 不同 RSU 位置/天线方案的路口覆盖与切换性能仿真。

table.Title: 高速 V2X
table.Text: 高速场景下高速移动 + 切换/编队的链路稳定性评估。

table.Title: AVP 自动泊车
table.Text: 地库 + 园区的电磁覆盖与定位精度联合评估。

table.Title: 商用车队
table.Text: 物流 + 矿山 + 港口的远程驾驶/编队链路保障。

table.Title: 车路云协同
table.Text: MEC + 路口 + 车端的端到端 KPI 仿真。

table.Label: 联合开展虚拟路测/V2X HIL 案例
与多家 RSU 设备商集成
与车规级自动化测试平台已对接
